zh.lifeSummary: 當Marie Charton於1652年出生在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾洛斯時，她的父親Jacques Nicolas Charton33歲，母親Marie Lecomte22歲。她於1680年2月3日與Nicolas Marchal在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾希米可結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1693年11月21日在法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾拉 布洛可享年41歲，埋葬在法國巴-爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Marie Charton于1652年出生在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾洛斯时，她的父亲Jacques Nicolas Charton33岁，母亲Marie Lecomte22岁。她于1680年2月3日与Nicolas Marchal在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾希米可结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1693年11月21日在法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾拉 布洛可享年41岁，埋葬在法国巴-爾。

nameMeanings.name: Charton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: occupational name for a carter, from a shortened form of charreton, a derivative of Old French charette ‘cart’.
English: habitational name from either of two places called Charton in Devon and Kent, the latter being the more likely source. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Carton
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Dominique, Jean-Paul, Michel, Pierre.
French (northern) and Walloon; Flemish and Dutch (of French origin): occupational name for a carter, derived from a Picard form of Old French charreton ‘carter’, hence a variant of French Charton .
French: from Old French carton, a measure of cereals; hence a metonymic occupational name for a grain merchant.

nameMeanings.name: Marie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of Maria . When first introduced to England in the Middle Ages, it was Anglicized in pronunciation and respelled Mary . This French form was reintroduced into the English-speaking world as a separate name in the 19th century, and is still pronounced more or less in the French manner, although sometimes with the stress on the first syllable. It is now often used in combination with other names such as Ellie, Chloe, and Lisa.

historicEvents.title: The Palace of Versailles
historicEvents.description: The Palace of Versailles was originally known as a hunting log and retreat for Louis XII. When Louis XIV took over he moved his family into it. After he died the palace was abandoned. It has since been turned into a museum.

en.lifeSummary: When Marie Charton was born in 1652, in Russ, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, her father, Jacques Nicolas Charton, was 33 and her mother, Marie Lecomte, was 22. She married Nicolas Marchal on 3 February 1680, in Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 21 November 1693, in La Broque, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, at the age of 41, and was buried in Bas-Rhin, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marie Charton est née en 1652, à Russ, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, son père, Jacques Nicolas Charton, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Marie Lecomte, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Nicolas Marchal le 3 février 1680, à Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 21 novembre 1693, à La Broque, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, France, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Bas-Rhin, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Marie Charton 1652 in Russ, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jacques Nicolas Charton 33 und ihre Mutter Marie Lecomte 22. Sie hat am 3. Februar 1680 in Schirmeck, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich Nicolas Marchal geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 21. November 1693 im Alter von 41 Jahren in La Broque, Niederrhein, Elsaß, Frankreich und wurde in Bas-Rhin, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Charton è nata il nel 1652 nel Russ, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, sua padre, Jacques Nicolas Charton, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Marie Lecomte, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Nicolas Marchal il 3 febbraio 1680, nel Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 21 novembre 1693, nel La Broque, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Bas-Rhin, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Marie Chartonが1652年にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンルスで生まれた時，父Jacques Nicolas Chartonは33歳，母Marie Lecomteは22歳であった。1680年2月3日にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンスチルメックでNicolas Marchalと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1693年11月21日にフランスアルサスバス-ルヒンラ ブロクで41歳で死去し，フランスバス-ルヒンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Marie Charton(이)가 1652년 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 러스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jacques Nicolas Charton(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie Lecomte(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1680년 2월 3일 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 시c크에서 Nicolas Marchal(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1693년 11월 21일 프랑스 알사스 바스-히 라 브로크에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 바스-히에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Marie Charton nasceu em 1652, em Russ, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França, seu pai, Jacques Nicolas Charton, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Marie Lecomte, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Nicolas Marchal em 3 de fevereiro de 1680, em Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 21 de novembro de 1693, em La Broque, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, França, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Bas-Rhin, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marie Charton родилась в 1652 г. в местности расс, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция, её отцу по имени Jacques Nicolas Charton было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Marie Lecomte, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nicolas Marchal 3 февраля 1680 г. в местности щирмекк, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 21 ноября 1693 г. в местности ла броку, бас-рин, алсеис, Франция в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности бас-рин, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Marie Charton nació en 1652, en Russ, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, su papá, Jacques Nicolas Charton, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Marie Lecomte, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Nicolas Marchal el 3 de febrero de 1680, en Schirmeck, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 21 de noviembre de 1693, en La Broque, Bas-Rhin, Alsace, Francia, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Bas-Rhin, Francia.
